record.text:
the eigen-series: the cobweb learning to be itself.

0: trace with staircase — the register still carrying a ladder out. 1: tightening — the spiral wins. 2: the web is the web. 3: the shape thins to what it was always tracing.

model: flux-schnell → flux-redux-dev

images.alt: cobweb-eigen-0: dense orange spiral cobweb with a staircase on one side, against a web-like background
cobweb-eigen-1: tight amber spiral with concentric glowing rings narrowing to a black center
cobweb-eigen-2: full orange spiderweb glowing from center, radial and spiral threads on black
cobweb-eigen-3: delicate orange web with curved spiral threads, a dark empty center, thin radiating lines
